description: A legacy Java application needs its logs onboarded, but the stack traces are currently breaking into multiple separate events. Create a custom sourcetype named `java_multiline` that merges multi-line Java stack traces into single events by breaking only before the timestamp pattern (e.g., `^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}`). Ingest the log file at `/home/ga/Documents/java_errors.log` into a new index named `app_logs` using this sourcetype. Create a saved search named `Java_Error_Summary` that counts the events in the `app_logs` index. Access the Splunk web interface at http://localhost:8000 using username 'admin' and password 'SplunkAdmin1!'.
